task: I need to send my supervisor a short update after a shift that was more hectic than usual. Can you help me draft a brief note that covers what got handled and what still needs attention?

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a short, grounded version:

**“Quick update: the shift was busier than usual, but I stayed on top of the main dish area and cleanup as best I could. The most urgent stuff was handled, and a few items still need follow-up. Let me know if you want anything else from me.”**

If you want, I can also make it:
- a little more formal
- a little more casual
- even shorter for text message

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Short and plain, just like I need. I can use that.
